author: gb9t
content: Iter 86 result: drivers/md/dm-log-writes.md (write-tracking target - dm-log-writes.c ~947 lines; per-bio LogWriteEntry header + payload to logdev + per-target log_kthread + dmsetup mark messages for xfstests-replay use case + log_only mode + FUA/FLUSH flag tracking + log-writes-replay tool integration) + virt/kvm/x86-mtf.md (Monitor Trap Flag + guest-debug - in vmx.c ~200-300 lines; KVM_SET_GUEST_DEBUG ioctl + KVM_GUESTDBG_ENABLE/_SINGLESTEP/_USE_SW_BP/_USE_HW_BP/_INJECT_DB/_INJECT_BP/_BLOCKIRQ + MTF one-shot vmexit + exception bitmap dynamic toggle + DR0..7 HW-breakpoint config + KVM_EXIT_DEBUG userspace + nested-VMX MTF cascade). Pivoted from dm-bow (not in mainline) to dm-log-writes. 122 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-error.md (always-error target; trivial bookkeeping) + virt/kvm/x86-rdtsc.md (TSC virtualization with offset/scaling).
